examples.title: Algorithm: Data Conversion Using valueOf
examples.description: Converting a string to an integer object using valueOf method
examples.code:
ALGORITHM DataConversion
INPUT: string
OUTPUT: integer object

BEGIN
 // Convert string to integer object using valueOf method
 integerObject = valueOf(string)
 RETURN integerObject
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the conversion of a string to an integer object using the valueOf method.
